title: crepis porrifolia
intro: Crepis porrifolia, also known as sea hawthorn or sow thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crepis porrifolia are said to include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as supporting immune function and reducing stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
